name: Pyramid Symbolism Entertainment
description: The concept of "Pyramid Symbolism Entertainment" posits that pyramids and related triangular imagery are deliberately incorporated into media, particularly films, music videos, and video games, to convey hidden messages or influence audiences subliminally. Proponents believe this symbolism is often associated with secret societies like the Illuminati, freemasonry, or other shadowy organizations, and that its use serves to either subtly control the population, promote a New World Order agenda, or reveal insider knowledge to those "in the know." The origins of this theory can be traced to broader conspiracy theories surrounding secret societies and their alleged control over various aspects of society, including media and politics. Key pieces of evidence cited include the prevalence of pyramid shapes, all-seeing eye motifs (often within pyramids), and triangular hand gestures in entertainment content. Mainstream scholarship generally dismisses these claims as pareidolia, confirmation bias, and a misinterpretation of common artistic and design choices. Academics argue that pyramids, as recognizable and aesthetically pleasing shapes, are frequently used for visual appeal and to convey concepts like power, stability, or mystery without any conspiratorial intent. The theory also often conflates legitimate historical symbolism with modern interpretations and assumes a unified, centrally controlled effort behind diverse creative works.
subtitle: Hidden messages in media?

claims.claim: Pyramids in entertainment represent Illuminati control.
claims.evidence: Frequent appearance of pyramid shapes and all-seeing eye imagery in films, music videos, and logos.
claims.criticism: These shapes are aesthetically pleasing, universally recognizable, and easily incorporated into designs. Symbolism is often subjective and open to interpretation.

claims.claim: Triangular hand gestures used by celebrities are secret signals.
claims.evidence: Celebrities making triangular hand gestures during performances or interviews.
claims.criticism: These gestures can be attributed to a variety of factors, including personal style, cultural trends, and accidental movements. Attributing them exclusively to secret societies is speculative.

claims.claim: Pyramid symbolism promotes a New World Order agenda.
claims.evidence: Use of pyramid imagery alongside themes of globalism, technology, and social control in entertainment.
claims.criticism: Correlation does not equal causation. These themes are prevalent in many modern narratives and reflect broader societal concerns and trends, not necessarily a hidden agenda.

keyFigures.name: Mark Dice
keyFigures.role: Popular conspiracy theorist who frequently discusses pyramid symbolism.

keyFigures.name: Michael Shermer
keyFigures.role: Skeptic and science writer who debunks conspiracy theories.

timeline.event: Rise of internet-based conspiracy theories linking pyramids to secret societies.
Increased awareness and discussion of pyramid symbolism in entertainment through social media and online videos.

sources.author: Carl Sagan
sources.work: The Demon-Haunted World: Science as a Candle in the Dark
sources.title: Carl Sagan
